who: construction project managers handling 5–10 projects simultaneously
offer: For construction project managers processing 5–10 projects simultaneously, inefficient tracking causes delayed reporting. We automate progress reporting instead of manual progress tracking through spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient tracking of project timelines leads to delayed reporting.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction project managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to construction project managers with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools among project managers
try_it: Let users try timeline visualization and manual input for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video showing manual-first workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing project data
